arts.ttl: 'Really sharp': Joe Hart super impressed by Chelsea player during 3-0 win against Aston Villa
arts.sum: Chelsea put in one of their most complete performances of the season so far to dispatch Aston Villa by a 3-0 scoreline over the weekend....

arts.ttl: "We're not ready" - Maresca downplays Chelsea title chances
arts.sum: Chelsea manager Enzo Maresca claims his team are not ready to challenge for the Premier League title, despite sitting third after a comfortable 3-0 against Aston Villa at Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa plotting January move for 24-year-old playmaker
arts.sum: Aston Villa are reportedly keen on signing the Werder Bremen attacking midfielder Romano Schmid. According to Football Insider, Aston Villa are hoping to add more quality and depth to their attacking unit, and they believe that the 24-year-old could prove to be a quality addition. He will add goals and creativity to the side, and […] The post Aston Villa plotting January move for 24-year-old playmaker appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Chelsea 3-0 Aston Villa: Match report and talking points from emphatic Blues victory
arts.sum: Match report and talking points from Chelsea 3-0 Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery explains brutal Aston Villa reality after Chelsea defeat as 'not completely' response given
arts.sum: I know this year is going to be more difficult because some teams are feeling stronger like Chelsea today. Last year we got a good result at Tottenham and Chelsea.

arts.ttl: I saw 'fantastic' Chelsea player absolutely outshine his Aston Villa counterpart in 3-0 win - opinion
Liam Delap latest: Chelsea and Man Utd face SHOCK competition
arts.sum: “My full focus is on this season and, with regards to Liam, trying to help him to continue to improve. The Serbian forward has been linked with a big-money move to the Premier League in recent years and Juventus reportedly sent scouts to watch Delap in action against Man Utd last weekend as they eye a possible deal for the 21-year-old.

arts.ttl: Chelsea 3-0 Aston Villa PLAYER RATINGS: Who has won over Blues fans? Who failed to take his chance? And who shone despite playing out of position?
arts.sum: KIERAN GILL AT STAMFORD BRIDGE: Goals from Nicolas Jackson, Enzo Fernandez and Cole Palmer saw the Blues register a third straight win in all competitions.

arts.ttl: Emi Martinez injury update after Aston Villa handed fresh blow in Chelsea clash
arts.sum: Unai Emery confirmed Emi Martinez suffered a hand injury in Aston Villa's defeat to Chelsea at Stamford Bridge. Villa were two goals behind Chelsea by the time Martinez was replaced after the break after Nicolas Jackson opened the scoring in the seventh minute, before Enzo Fernandez double their advantage.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa player ratings after 3-0 Chelsea defeat as winless run continues
arts.sum: Ollie Watkins missed two big chances either side of Chelsea’s goals as he failed to beat Robert Sanchez in a one-on-one shortly after Jackson broke the deadlock, before Jaden Philogene set him at the end of the half, but his finish was tame again. Villa were also dealt a blow ahead of next week’s home matches against Brentford and Southampton as Emi Martinez was replaced by Robin Olsen at half-time after appearing to be in some discomfort.
